hero.title: One Operating Model for Hybrid Infrastructure
hero.subtitle: Manage public Cloud, private infrastructure, hypervisors, and edge environments without separate toolchains.

painPoints.title: Hybrid & Multi-Cloud Challenges You Face
painPoints.subtitle: Why separate consoles, cost views, and automation models multiply hybrid operations overhead

items.title: Separate Toolchains
items.description: Each environment brings its own console, APIs, and operational practices.

items.title: Cost Opacity
items.description: Spend and utilisation are scattered across providers with no unified view.

items.title: Orchestration Gaps
items.description: Cross-provider automation requires brittle custom integrations.

items.title: Edge Fragmentation
items.description: Edge, on-premises, and Cloud resources operate as disconnected silos.

solution.title: One Operating Model
solution.description: Unified dashboard, orchestration, and governance for hybrid and multi-Cloud infrastructure.

items.name: Electros
items.description: Unified dashboard for governance, cost visibility, automation, and remote access.

items.name: Atomosphere
items.description: Cross-provider orchestration and resource abstraction across public and sovereign Cloud.

items.name: Atomosquare
items.description: Integrate private hypervisors and legacy platforms into the same operating model.

items.name: AtomOS
items.description: Consistent execution layer for on-premises and edge workloads.

useCase.title: Hybrid & Multi-Cloud Journey
useCase.subtitle: A structured approach with Elemento's Metacloud platform

items.title: Connect Estates
items.description: Onboard public Cloud, private infrastructure, hypervisors, and edge into Electros.

items.title: Abstract Resources
items.description: Use Atomosphere to normalise provider APIs behind a single operational model.

items.title: Automate Operations
items.description: Deploy, scale, and govern workloads with consistent automation across environments.

items.title: Optimise Continuously
items.description: Track cost, utilisation, and governance from one dashboard with remote access built in.

stats.title: Hybrid & Multi-Cloud Impact
stats.subtitle: Real outcomes with the Metacloud platform

faq.title: Hybrid & Multi-Cloud FAQ
faq.subtitle: Frequently asked questions about hybrid and multi-cloud operations with the Metacloud

items.question: Do we still need provider-native consoles?
items.answer: For deep provider-specific tasks, yes. But day-to-day operations—deployment, monitoring, governance, and cost visibility—happen in Electros.

items.question: Which providers are supported?
items.answer: Atomosphere connects supported public and sovereign Cloud service classes. Atomosquare extends coverage to private hypervisors and on-premises infrastructure.

items.question: How does remote access work?
items.answer: Electros provides secure remote access to infrastructure across environments without VPN sprawl or per-provider jump hosts.

items.question: Can we automate across Cloud and on-premises?
items.answer: Yes. The same automation and policy model applies whether workloads run in public Cloud, private data centres, or at the edge.

ctaFinal.title: Ready for Hybrid & Multi-Cloud?
ctaFinal.subtitle: Replace tool sprawl with one operating model for public Cloud, private infrastructure, and edge.

hero.title: Un modello operativo per l'infrastruttura ibrida
hero.subtitle: Gestisci Cloud pubblico, infrastruttura privata, hypervisor e edge senza toolchain separate.

painPoints.title: Le sfide di Ibrido e multi-Cloud
painPoints.subtitle: Perché console, viste costi e modelli di automazione separati moltiplicano il carico operativo ibrido

items.title: Toolchain separate
items.description: Ogni ambiente porta la propria console, API e pratiche operative.

items.title: Opacità dei costi
items.description: Spesa e utilizzo sono dispersi tra provider senza una vista unificata.

items.title: Lacune di orchestrazione
items.description: L'automazione cross-provider richiede integrazioni custom fragili.

items.title: Frammentazione edge
items.description: Risorse edge, on-premises e Cloud operano come silos disconnessi.

solution.title: Un modello operativo
solution.description: Dashboard, orchestrazione e governance unificate per infrastruttura ibrida e multi-Cloud.

items.name: Electros
items.description: Dashboard unificata per governance, visibilità dei costi, automazione e accesso remoto.

items.name: Atomosphere
items.description: Orchestrazione cross-provider e astrazione delle risorse su Cloud pubblici e sovrani.

items.name: Atomosquare
items.description: Integra hypervisor privati e piattaforme legacy nello stesso modello operativo.

items.name: AtomOS
items.description: Layer di esecuzione coerente per workload on-premises e edge.

useCase.subtitle: Un approccio strutturato con il Metacloud Elemento

items.title: Collega gli ambienti
items.description: Onboarda Cloud pubblico, infrastruttura privata, hypervisor e edge in Electros.

items.title: Astrai le risorse
items.description: Usa Atomosphere per normalizzare le API dei provider dietro un unico modello operativo.

items.title: Automatizza le operazioni
items.description: Distribuisci, scala e governa i workload con automazione coerente tra ambienti.

items.title: Ottimizza in continuo
items.description: Monitora costi, utilizzo e governance da un'unica dashboard con accesso remoto integrato.

stats.title: Impatto Ibrido e multi-Cloud
stats.subtitle: Risultati concreti con la piattaforma Metacloud

faq.title: FAQ Ibrido e multi-Cloud
faq.subtitle: Domande frequenti sulle operazioni ibride e multi-Cloud con il Metacloud

items.question: Servono ancora le console native dei provider?
items.answer: Per task specifici del provider, sì. Ma le operazioni quotidiane avvengono in Electros.

items.question: Quali provider sono supportati?
items.answer: Atomosphere collega le classi di servizio Cloud supportate. Atomosquare estende la copertura agli hypervisor privati.

items.question: Come funziona l'accesso remoto?
items.answer: Electros fornisce accesso remoto sicuro senza proliferazione di VPN o jump host per provider.

items.question: Possiamo automatizzare tra Cloud e on-premises?
items.answer: Sì. Lo stesso modello di automazione e policy si applica in Cloud pubblico, data center privati o edge.

ctaFinal.title: Pronto per Ibrido e multi-Cloud?
ctaFinal.subtitle: Sostituisci la proliferazione di strumenti con un modello operativo unico per Cloud, privato ed edge.

hero.title: Un modèle opérationnel pour l'infrastructure hybride
hero.subtitle: Gérez Cloud public, infrastructure privée, hyperviseurs et edge sans chaînes d'outils séparées.

painPoints.title: Les défis Hybride et multi-Cloud
painPoints.subtitle: Pourquoi consoles, vues de coûts et modèles d'automatisation séparés multiplient la charge opérationnelle hybride

items.title: Chaînes d'outils séparées
items.description: Chaque environnement apporte sa console, ses API et ses pratiques opérationnelles.

items.title: Opacité des coûts
items.description: Dépenses et utilisation sont dispersées entre fournisseurs sans vue unifiée.

items.title: Lacunes d'orchestration
items.description: L'automatisation cross-fournisseur nécessite des intégrations fragiles.

items.title: Fragmentation edge
items.description: Ressources edge, on-premises et Cloud opèrent en silos déconnectés.

solution.title: Un modèle opérationnel
solution.description: Tableau de bord, orchestration et gouvernance unifiés pour infrastructure hybride et multi-Cloud.

items.name: Electros
items.description: Tableau de bord unifié pour gouvernance, visibilité des coûts, automatisation et accès distant.

items.name: Atomosphere
items.description: Orchestration cross-fournisseur et abstraction des ressources sur Cloud publics et souverains.

items.name: Atomosquare
items.description: Intégrez hyperviseurs privés et plateformes existantes dans le même modèle opérationnel.

items.name: AtomOS
items.description: Couche d'exécution cohérente pour charges on-premises et edge.

items.title: Automatiser les opérations

stats.title: Impact Hybride et multi-Cloud
stats.subtitle: Résultats concrets avec la plateforme Metacloud

faq.title: FAQ Hybride et multi-Cloud
faq.subtitle: Questions fréquentes sur les opérations hybrides et multi-Cloud avec le Metacloud

items.question: Faut-il encore les consoles natives des fournisseurs ?
items.answer: Pour les tâches spécifiques au fournisseur, oui. Mais les opérations quotidiennes se font dans Electros.

items.question: Quels fournisseurs sont pris en charge ?
items.answer: Atomosphere connecte les classes de service Cloud prises en charge. Atomosquare étend la couverture aux hyperviseurs privés.

items.question: Comment fonctionne l'accès distant ?
items.answer: Electros fournit un accès distant sécurisé sans prolifération de VPN ou bastions par fournisseur.

items.question: Peut-on automatiser entre Cloud et on-premises ?
items.answer: Oui. Le même modèle d'automatisation et de politiques s'applique en Cloud public, data centers privés ou edge.

ctaFinal.title: Prêt pour Hybride et multi-Cloud ?
ctaFinal.subtitle: Remplacez la prolifération d'outils par un modèle opérationnel unique pour Cloud public, privé et edge.
